zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton於1454年出生在英國爾法爾登時，她的父親Sir Robert De Fouleshurst34歲，母親Joan de Whitmore20歲。她於1473年與John Dutton在英國英格蘭爾哈頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1516年2月5日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾福洛德斯利享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton于1454年出生在英国爾法爾登时，她的父亲Sir Robert De Fouleshurst34岁，母亲Joan de Whitmore20岁。她于1473年与John Dutton在英国英格兰爾哈頓结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1516年2月5日在英国英格兰史洛普爾福洛德斯利享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton was born in 1454, in Farndon, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir Robert De Fouleshurst, was 34 and her mother, Joan de Whitmore, was 20. She married John Dutton in 1473, in Hatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 5 February 1516, in Frodesley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton est née en 1454, à Farndon, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert De Fouleshurst, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joan de Whitmore, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John Dutton en 1473, à Hatton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 5 février 1516, à Frodesley, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton 1454 in Farndon, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert De Fouleshurst 34 und ihre Mutter Joan de Whitmore 20. Sie hat 1473 in Hatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom John Dutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 5. Februar 1516 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Frodesley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton è nata il nel 1454 nel Farndon, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Sir Robert De Fouleshurst, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Joan de Whitmore, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John Dutton nel 1473, nel Hatton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 5 febbraio 1516, nel Frodesley, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hattonが1454年にイギリスチェシュアイアファルンドンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert De Fouleshurstは34歳，母Joan de Whitmoreは20歳であった。1473年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアハットオンでJohn Duttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1516年2月5日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアフロデスリーで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton(이)가 1454년 영국 체실르 패른던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert De Fouleshurst(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Whitmore(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1473년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 해턴에서 John Dutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1516년 2월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 프로데슬리에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton nasceu em 1454, em Farndon, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert De Fouleshurst, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Whitmore, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John Dutton em 1473, em Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 5 de fevereiro de 1516, em Frodesley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton родилась в 1454 г. в местности фарндон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert De Fouleshurst было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Whitmore, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Dutton в 1473 г. в местности хаттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 5 февраля 1516 г. в местности фродесли, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton nació en 1454, en Farndon, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert De Fouleshurst, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Joan de Whitmore, tenía 20 años. Se casó con John Dutton en 1473, en Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 5 de febrero de 1516, en Frodesley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años.
